W J T l 894(31) ftflfa 7-9-2001 ( 6 ) U"^r.3IT. 32(31)1^*'10-1-2003 (7) U ^ . s n . 599(31)-fcrar 26-5-2003 2363 GI/2003 , O) -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THEGAZETTEOFINDIA:EXTRAORDINARy (PART H—SEC. 3(ii)] MINISTRY OF ENVIRONMENT AND FORESTS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 21 st August, 2003 S.0.955(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by Section 15 of the Prevention of Cruelty to Animals Act, 1960 (59 of 1960), the Central Government, on the advice of the Board, hereby makes the following amendment in the notification of the Go vernment of India in the Ministry of Emarorunent and Forests, S.0.32(E) dated 10-1-2003. In the said notification after Serial No. 18 and the entries relating thereto, the following serial number and entries shall be inserted, namely:— 18 Dr. P. K. Dave, - —Member A-8, Sector-26, Noida-201301(U.P.) [F.No.25/l/2003-AWD] M. SAHU, Jt Secy.
